blocks.text: James Keller, with James Green and Jason Torres copied:

Thank you for the first batch of management accounts, which came through on Friday. James Green has started reconciling the cost of delivery against them and the tie-out is close. Where it does not yet agree, the gaps are in the accounts broken out by legal entity rather than by product line, which is the cut we need to allocate margin to where it is actually earned at {{fact:f:E-2022-001.client}}.

There are a couple of things we could use from your team this week. The one that unlocks the most is the sales transaction extract for the trailing year at the line level, so we can look at realized prices against list rather than at averages. It would also help to have a name for whoever manages pricing and discount approvals, so we can add a short interview before drawing any conclusions about discounting.

Nothing else is needed from you today. Jason Torres will send the proposed interview list tomorrow with suggested times, so your assistants can put them on calendars. We are glad to be getting into the numbers on the Walker-Murray program.
